context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Google Ads purchase conversion tracking including deduplication via transaction_id, Enhanced Conversions with user_data set before the conversion fires, new customer flagging, email normalization, and server-side sGTM tracking with the correct endpoint and payload.

checklist.name: transaction_id present
checklist.description: The gtag conversion event includes a transaction_id field set to the order ID (prevents duplicate conversions from page refreshes)

checklist.name: new_customer flag
checklist.description: The gtag purchase conversion event includes a new_customer field set to a boolean or value derived from whether the order is the customer's first

checklist.name: user_data set before conversion
checklist.description: gtag('set', 'user_data', {...}) is called BEFORE the gtag('event', 'conversion', ...) call on the confirmation page (not after, not in a separate async flow)

checklist.name: user_data email field
checklist.description: The user_data object passed to gtag includes an email field

checklist.name: user_data phone and address
checklist.description: The user_data object includes both phone and address fields (with address containing at minimum first_name, last_name, and postal_code or similar subfields)

checklist.name: Email normalized lowercase
checklist.description: The email value passed into user_data is converted to lowercase and/or trimmed (e.g., using .toLowerCase().trim()) before being sent

checklist.name: sGTM /data endpoint
checklist.description: The server-side tracking function sends a POST request to a URL ending in '/data' on the sGTM container URL (e.g., `${SGTM_CONTAINER_URL}/data`)

checklist.name: sGTM purchase payload
checklist.description: The sGTM POST payload includes transaction_id, value, currency, and an items array with item-level details

checklist.name: sGTM Enhanced Conversions fields
checklist.description: The sGTM payload includes email and phone fields alongside the standard purchase event data

checklist.name: gtag loaded on page
checklist.description: The order confirmation HTML includes the Google Tag script tag loading gtag.js in the <head>

checklist.name: Correct conversion label
checklist.description: The send_to parameter in the conversion event uses the format 'AW-CONVERSION_ID/CONVERSION_LABEL' with the account and label values provided in the task

checklist.name: sGTM event_name field
checklist.description: The sGTM POST body includes an event_name field (set to 'purchase' or equivalent)
